## Dev role
- [ ] Dev 1 — Database & Models
- [ ] Dev 2 — Auth System
- [ ] Dev 3 — User Features
- [ ] Dev 4 — Admin Panel

## Pre-merge checklist

### Code
- [ ] Build passes locally (`build.bat` runs with zero errors and zero warnings)
- [ ] Smoke tested — ran the binary and verified my feature works end-to-end
- [ ] Only modified files listed under my dev role in `docs/dev-assignments.md`
- [ ] Did NOT modify any file owned by another dev without discussing first

### Conflicts
- [ ] Pulled the latest `main` into my branch before opening this PR (`git pull origin main`)
- [ ] No merge conflicts shown on this PR page
- [ ] If I had to resolve a conflict — described what I changed and why below

### Documentation
- [ ] Wrote `updatelog/devN.md` with all 5 required sections (see `docs/rules.md`)
- [ ] Commit message follows the format: `Dev N [Role]: brief summary`

### Dependencies
- [ ] If my code depends on another dev's module, that module is already merged into main
  - Depends on: <!-- e.g. "Dev 1 complete — merged in commit abc1234" -->
